steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank fills "Although ______ particles range in size..." The particles belong to the Andromedid meteoroid stream — a single, singular entity. The blank needs a possessive determiner showing ownership, not a pronoun standing alone or a contraction.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — their: plural possessive. The Andromedid meteoroid stream is singular, so a plural possessive doesn't match the antecedent — eliminate. ✗
  • Choice B — they're: contraction of "they are." Inserting it gives "they are particles range in size," which is ungrammatical — eliminate. ✗
  • Choice C — it's: contraction of "it is." Inserting it gives "it is particles range in size," which is equally ungrammatical — eliminate. ✗
  • Choice D — its: singular possessive with no apostrophe. Correctly shows the particles belong to the singular Andromedid stream and reads grammatically. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
